hero.title: The easiest way to rent a car

hero.description: {appName} connects vehicle owners with people who need a car. From economy to luxury sports cars.

features.title: Why choose {appName}?

features.securBookingDesc: All vehicles are verified and include insurance coverage.
features.easyPaymentDesc: Pay securely with Mercado Pago. No hidden fees.

howItWorks.step3Desc: Pick up the vehicle and enjoy your trip worry-free
